mapper.insert: insert into routes (creator_account_id, title, region_code, days, outline, detail_json) values (#{creatorAccountId}, #{title}, #{regionCode}, #{days}, #{outline}, #{detailJson})
mapper.update: update routes set creator_account_id = #{creatorAccountId}, title = #{title}, region_code = #{regionCode}, days = #{days}, outline = #{outline}, detail_json = #{detailJson} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, creator_account_id, title, region_code, days, outline, detail_json, created_at from routes
